description: "Hi, thanks for calling the Hospital Payment Line — this is Remy. I can help you check your balance or take a payment over the phone. To get started, are you calling to check your payment balance, or to make a payment?"
error_message: you have reached a custom error message

intents.intent_description: Provide assistance and information about the bot's capabilities when the user requests help or asks what the bot can do.
intents.name: Help

utterances.utterance: I would like some help, please.
Would you be able to help me?
Can you provide details on how you may assist?

intents.intent_description: Handle user input that doesn't match any other defined intent, providing a fallback response to keep the conversation flowing.
intents.name: Default fallback intent

intents.intent_description: Acknowledge and respond appropriately when the user is ending the conversation with a farewell or departure expression.
intents.name: Goodbye

intents.intent_description: Respond appropriately when the user initiates conversation with a greeting or salutation, including hellos, time-based greetings, and casual farewells.
intents.name: Greetings

intents.intent_description: Handle user feedback indicating dissatisfaction with the bot's response, including complaints about inaccuracy, irrelevance, confusion, or general unhelpfulness.
intents.name: Not helpful

intents.intent_description: Acknowledge and respond appropriately when the user expresses gratitude or thanks.
intents.name: Thank you

intents.intent_description: Escalate the conversation to a human agent when the user requests to speak with a real person or human support.
intents.name: Talk to an agent

utterances.utterance: Can I talk to a human?
I need to speak to a person
Please transfer me to a human agent
I want to talk to support
Can you connect me to a real person?

intents.intent_description: Check the payment balance of patients
intents.name: Payment Balance

utterances.utterance: I would like to check my balance
Can you tell me how much I owe on my hospital bill?
I'd like to know my current payment balance for my medical services.
Can you provide me with the current outstanding balance on my account?
I'd like to find out how much I still owe for my treatment.
Please let me know my payment balance for the hospital charges.
What is the remaining balance on my medical bill?
Could you check my account for any outstanding payments?
I need to know the total amount owed for my hospital visit.
Can you confirm the balance due on my healthcare expenses?
What’s my current payment status for the services I've received?

intents.intent_description: Used to make hospital payment balance
intents.name: Make_Payment

utterances.utterance: I would like to make payment
I need to settle my hospital bill, please.
Can you help me process my payment for the hospital?
I'm here to pay my medical expenses.
I'd like to go ahead and make my hospital payment.
Could you assist me in completing my payment for the hospital services?
I want to take care of my hospital charges now.
Can we finalize my payment for the medical treatment I received?
I’m ready to make my payment for the hospital visit.
How do I go about paying my hospital bill?
I’d like to process the payment for my recent hospital visit.
Could you provide your payment information?
I need your billing details to proceed.
Please share your payment method with us.
Can you give me the details related to your payment?
I require your payment specifics to move forward.
Would you mind entering your payment credentials?
What payment details do you want to provide?
Please input your billing information for processing.
I'd appreciate your payment details when you're ready.

text: Please wait while I redirect you to one of our team member.
Choose one of the following or provide your own
Sorry, I am unable to understand your message. Could you please rephrase it?

Hey, this is one of the sample intents which can be recognised. Intents are the user scenarios or flows which the bot can complete, while entities are the parameter which are required to complete and intent. Go ahead and configure a new intent to get started.
Sorry,  I hear that wasn't able to help you. Please try asking a different question.
Sorry, I was unable to understand your query accurately. Could you select which intent you were referring to?
